title: Remove "Save" Sort
excerpt: I hit “Save” after sorting a column a certain way and now I want to remove it but do not see where I can do that. I understand that before I click “Save” there is a “Clear” button… but we are past that as I already hit “…

posts.author: sarah-pdm (Sarah)
posts.cookedHtml: I hit “Save” after sorting a column a certain way and now I want to remove it but do not see where I can do that. I understand that before I click “Save” there is a “Clear” button… but we are past that as I already hit “Save.” I liked how the board was arranged prior to sorting- it was based on order those tasks are automatically moved to that board and no other column is set up that way. Any suggestions?

posts.author: malia.monday (Malia)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Sarah! Currently, there is no option to undo a sort when you perform the sort directly on the column and then save those changes. However, if a sort is applied from the toolbar on the board, you can adjust these sorts:

Screenshot 2024-09-16 at 2.20.26 PM831×523 26.7 KB
